events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess drain vent path. Scenario: under bathroom sink, P-trap correct outlet geometry connects to sanitary tee entering wall. Wall closed finished. No photo of rough-in, no vent info. Need decide if can approve from what shown. Need additional evidence. Since wall closed, cannot verify vent connection. A sanitary tee in wall may serve as vent if properly vented, but no evidence. Code IPC requires each trap have vent except for special conditions (e.g., island fixture vent, AAV, etc). Need determine if drain arrangement can be approved from shown: needs_more_info. Risk maybe medium/high because missing vent verification in finished wall. Component conditions none. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 80? value not asked 0. Findings: vent path not verified; wall closed prevents inspection. Actions: open wall or provide rough-in photos/permits/inspection records verifying vent; pressure/smoke test? references IPC sections trap venting. Need produce JSON exactly. Let's craft.

    "The finished wall conceals the drain/vent rough-in, so the vent connection cannot be verified.",
    "No rough-in photos, inspection records, or as-built drawings confirm the fixture is properly vented.",
    "A P-trap alone does not prove compliance; the trap arm must connect to a vented sanitary tee or approved venting method."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Obtain rough-in photographs or inspection records showing the sanitary tee is connected to a vent within code distance.",
    "If documentation is unavailable, open the wall at the tee/vent connection for visual verification before approval.",
    "Verify trap-arm length and fall comply with IPC Table 909.1 for the fixture drain size."
  ],
  "rationale": "The visible finished installation only shows the trap and wall entry. Because the wall is closed and no venting evidence is provided, code compliance for the required fixture vent cannot be confirmed. Approval is withheld pending verification.",
  "references": [
    "IPC 901.2 - Each trap shall be vented in accordance with this code",
    "IPC 909.1 - Distance of trap from vent",
    "IPC 905.1 - Vent connection"
  ]
